summary: Completed E2E testing of GED template functionality and React Router navigation. Backend API tests: 14/14 passed. Frontend UI tests: All critical flows working. One backend bug found in /api/users endpoint.

critical.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error - Pydantic validation fails because response_model=List[User] requires hashed_password but the query excludes it with {"_id": 0, "hashed_password": 0}
critical.fix_suggestion: Change response_model to a UserResponse model that doesn't include hashed_password, or remove response_model validation

minor.issue: type_document is required even when load_from_template_id is provided. The template loading logic happens after validation, so the field must be provided by the frontend.
minor.note: Frontend correctly pre-fills the field from template before submission, so this works in practice

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: /api/users endpoint - Create UserResponse model without hashed_password field or remove response_model validation
OPTIONAL: Consider making type_document optional in POST /api/documents/ when load_from_template_id is provided
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 847-858: GET /api/users uses response_model=List[User] but excludes hashed_password from query - causes Pydantic validation error
routes_ged.py line 72: type_document: str = Form(...) is required but template loading happens after validation
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test templates via API: TEST_Circulaire_Type
context_for_next_testing_agent: GED template functionality is fully working. React Router navigation works across all dashboard pages. The /api/users endpoint has a critical bug that needs fixing. All other GED endpoints work correctly.

details: Navigation between Dashboard, Documents, Provinces, Etablissements, Classes works
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
GET /api/documents/templates/list - Returns list of templates correctly
POST /api/documents/ with save_as_template=true - Creates template with template_name and template_description
POST /api/documents/ with load_from_template_id - Pre-fills document from template (requires type_document to be provided)
Template dropdown 'Utiliser un modèle existant (optionnel)' visible and functional
Selecting template shows toast 'Modèle X chargé' and pre-fills form fields
Checkbox 'Sauvegarder comme modèle réutilisable' shows template name/description fields when checked
Button changes to 'Créer le modèle' when save as template is checked

/api/users_500_error.root_cause: Pydantic response_model validation requires hashed_password field but query excludes it
/api/users_500_error.mitigation: Create UserResponse model without hashed_password or use dict response
